news.t: Main Management ETF Advisors Joins LPL Financial's ETF No Transaction Fee (NTF) Sponsorship Program

holdings.infoBox: TMAT is an equity ETF with a total of 88 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 4.75%, Palo Alto Networks at 3.54%, Vicor at 3.00%, Lumentum Holdings at 2.50%, and CrowdStrike Holdings at 2.33%.

overview.description: The Main Thematic Innovation ETF (TMAT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed to pursue aggressive growth, globally. The fund aims to outperform the MSCI ACWI Index in rising markets while limiting losses during periods of decline TMAT was launched on Jan 29, 2021 and is issued by Main Management.

data.title: Main Management ETF Advisors Joins LPL Financial's ETF No Transaction Fee (NTF) Sponsorship Program
data.text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Main Management ETF Advisors ETFs BUYW, SECT, TMAT and INTL join LPL Financial's ETF No Transaction Fee (NTF) Sponsorship Program.
